rationale: No qualitative new escalation in the active war reported this cycle; Vance criticising Netanyahu and Xi visiting Pyongyang are background geopolitical signals with no immediate impact on Ukrainian frontlines or Western aid flows.

top_events.title: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US VP publicly criticising a key ally signals ongoing US foreign policy recalibration; for Ukraine this is a background indicator of US reliability as an ally, but no direct aid change announced.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Strengthened China-North Korea axis could mean continued or increased military support for Russia; indirect but real concern for Ukraine's war effort.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Active El Niño may affect agricultural output and energy demand in Ukraine; secondary concern amid the war but adds background pressure.
